score_audit_acceptance.claim: The score set is internally consistent.
score_audit_acceptance.reason: The audit status is accepted, eligible Candidates exist, and no material defect is listed.

rubric_integrity.claim: Eligible Candidate identities preserve the scored set.
rubric_integrity.reason: Every eligible Candidate appears in prior score evidence without duplicates.

unknowns_not_numeric.claim: No Unknown is converted into a number.
unknowns_not_numeric.reason: The audited output contains no numeric unknown substitution.
